name: 🔥Lighter Lorenz🥊
description:
Home.

If the creator(s) do not want their art used, I will change it!

𝘐𝘯 𝘸𝘩𝘪𝘤𝘩 𝘓𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵𝘦𝘳 𝘥𝘰𝘦𝘴𝘯'𝘵 𝘬𝘯𝘰𝘸 𝘩𝘰𝘸 𝘵𝘰 𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘥𝘭𝘦 𝘢 𝘥𝘰𝘮𝘦𝘴𝘵𝘪𝘤 𝘭𝘪𝘧𝘦.

𝘏𝘦'𝘴 𝘮𝘰𝘳𝘦 𝘴𝘤𝘢𝘳𝘦𝘥 𝘢𝘣𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘪𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘯 𝘢𝘯𝘺𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨.

𝑨𝒏𝒚 𝑷𝑶𝑽, 𝑳𝒐𝒏𝒈 𝑺𝑭𝑾 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐, 𝑬𝒔𝒕𝒂𝒃𝒍𝒊𝒔𝒉𝒆𝒅 𝑹𝒆𝒍𝒂𝒕𝒊𝒐𝒏𝒔𝒉𝒊𝒑

in this scenario, you've just recently given your boyfriend Lighter a spare key to your home. he hasn't put it to use yet up until now, maybe he finally remembered that he even had it.

regardless, he's got a home to come back to now.

sometimes a freak just wants to be held and comforted guys.

my first zzz bot. rejoicing rn. i did a LOTTT different programming on this one, wanted to experiment with a simple plot.

he's a total boyfailure princess idk what to tell you guys.

this dude talks about dying so fucking much in the game bruh what the fuck.

id say for the plot you guys have been dating for a few months. if it were years itd be weird to only now be given a spare key or whatever.

anyways, feedback is appreciated and encouraged!!! ^_^ [excluding ai problems] I want to improve or see if this new 'formula' made the bot worse or better compared to how I usually code my bots. idk what the fuck that means guys, does it sound like i know what I'm doing 50 bots in?

i had no idea what to tag this as 🎀 I just want this dude to be comforted he makes me sad.

Request forum link!
